servinfo.title: Knee Air Bag (Inflator) Module Inspection (9-Channel Air Bag System)

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Knee Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation (9-Channel Air Bag System)

attention1.ptxt: Failure to take proper precautions when inspecting the knee air bag (inflator) module can result in personal injury due to accidental deployment of the air bag.
Never attempt to measure the resistance of the air bag (inflator) module.

servinfo.ptxt: Check air bag (inflator) module. Replace air bag (inflator) module if any of the following conditions is found.

item.ptxt: Air bag (inflator) module is deformed or damaged.
Mounting sections of air bag (inflator) module are deformed or damaged.
